definitions: A three-way agreement between an employer, employee, and a finance company for the lease of a vehicle, where the employer takes on the employee's lease obligations.
A type of car lease arrangement common in Australia where an employer pays for an employee's car lease and running costs directly from their pre-tax salary.
examples: Many companies offer novated leasing as a benefit.
She opted for novated leasing to manage her car expenses.
The novated leasing agreement was signed by all three parties.
